hero.title: Fullstack Developer
hero.subtitle: Web · Mobile · AI
hero.description: Developer specialized in building high-performance web and mobile applications, with experience in AI integration and 11+ production deployments.

about.title: About me
about.description1: I'm a Computer Systems Engineer specialized in Software Development, passionate about building digital solutions that generate real impact.
about.description2: With 2+ years of experience in real projects, I've worked in startups and freelance projects developing everything from APIs to mobile apps with Flutter.
about.description3: In 2025 I was a speaker at Mexico's National Health Strategic Agenda Forum (TecNM), presenting research on AI applied to healthcare.
